Class WeightCalculatorFilter

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.cloud.gateway.server.mvc.filter.WeightCalculatorFilter
All Implemented Interfaces:
jakarta.servlet.Filter, EventListener, org.springframework.context.ApplicationListener<org.springframework.context.ApplicationEvent>, org.springframework.context.event.SmartApplicationListener, org.springframework.core.Ordered
public class WeightCalculatorFilter extends Object implements jakarta.servlet.Filter, org.springframework.core.Ordered, org.springframework.context.event.SmartApplicationListener

Spencer Gibb, Alexey Nakidkin
